meaning: n.墨尔本(有二:其一为澳大利亚东南部港市,另一为美国佛罗里达州东部城市)
examples: There is no public car parking at Sea Life Melbourne Aquarium.
Sea Life Melbourne Aquarium is the very place that you cannot miss when you visit the city.
If Fosters's bosses are determined to fight for its independence, they should buy a crate of Melbourne Old-and-Yellow.
Wozniacki can retain her top ranking if she reaches the last four in Melbourne.
The records are the foundation documents of European settlement in the Port Phillip and Melbourne region.
